root_cause: Node condition oscillated between Ready and MemoryPressure states
evidence: Node condition transitions observed: NodeReady -> MemoryPressure -> NodeReady -> MemoryPressure
Current MemoryPressure condition status is True
Observed 4 node condition transition events within 20 minutes

causes.message: Timeline shows repeated transitions between NodeReady and MemoryPressure
Node repeatedly crossed the MemoryPressure threshold and recovered
Workloads are unstable because node health signals do not converge on a stable operating state

node:node1: Repeated NodeReady and MemoryPressure transitions observed
pod:memory-thrash-pod: Pod is assigned to a node whose health condition repeatedly oscillated

likely_causes: Node resource pressure is repeatedly crossing the recovery threshold
Competing workloads or system daemons are causing unstable node pressure recovery
The node recovers briefly and then re-enters pressure before workloads can stabilize
Underlying host instability is causing repeated pressure and recovery cycles
suggested_checks: Inspect recent node condition transition events in order
Check node resource usage trends around each pressure transition
